common.noMatches: Ga go na dipalo tse di tshwanetseng

keys.backupCreated: Backup ya senotlolo e bopilwe le go laolwa ✓
keys.restored: Backup ya senotlolo e busitswe ✓ Dinotlolo di tsenngwe mo lefelong la gago
keys.noBackup: Ga go na backup e e sireletsegileng e e leng teng mo akhaonteng e
keys.missingPublicKey: Backup e tlhoka senotlolo sa phatlalatsa

keySetup.title: Tlhoma dinotlolo tsa gago tsa selemong
keySetup.description: Selemong seno ga se na senotlolo sa gago sa poraebete. Imporita backup e e sireletsegileng ka password, kgotsa bopa pair e ncha ya dinotlolo (o tla kgona go bala melaetsa e mecha go tlo go tloga jaanong).
keySetup.chooseFile: Kgetha faele mme o tsenye password.
keySetup.imported: Senotlolo sa poraebete se imporitswe mo selemong seno. O ka bala melaetsa ya kgale jaanong.
keySetup.enterPassword: Tsenya password ya akhaonto ya gago gore re kgone go boloka dinotlolo tsa gago ka polokeleo.

auth.headline: Melaetsa e e sireletsegileng mo bathong botlhe, mo mafatsheng otlhe
auth.description: Sireletso e e felletseng go tlo qetellong, phetolelo mo dipuo tse di fetang 100, melaetsa e e nyamalang, le go letsa ka lentswe/kgwele.

feature.encryption: Sireletso e e felletseng go tlo qetellong ka tlhago
feature.translation: Phetolelo e e bohlale e e haeng mo melaetseng
feature.disappearing: Melaetsa e e nyamalang & dikgopolo tsa go bala
feature.privacy: Polokeleo e le ya pele. Datha ya gago, taolo ya gago.
feature.translate: Phetolelo e e bohlale e e haeng mo melaetseng

hero.line1: Melaetsa e e sireletsegileng mo bathong botlhe, mo mafatsheng otlhe — ka
hero.em: phetolelo mo dipuo tse di fetang 100
hero.sub: Fetola nomoro ya gago ya founo e e sireletsegileng ya mahala gore o letsa le go romela melaetsa mo lefatseng lotlhe ka Wi-Fi kgotsa datha. Nwetsa sireletso e e felletseng go tlo qetellong, melaetsa e e nyamalang, le go letsa ka lentswe/kgwele ka HD — ka dithulaganyo tse di haeng mo go thuseng go nna o kopane go tlo mo mekgwatleng.
hero.freeNote: Go letsa le go romela melaetsa ka mahala. Dithulaganyo tsa AI tse di phahameng le dithulaganyo tsa premium di tlhoka upgrade.

feat.encryption: Sireletso e e felletseng go tlo qetellong, ka tlhago
feat.translate: Tlosa dithibelo tsa puo mo dikopanong tsa gago
feat.disappear: Melaetsa e e nyamalang & dikgopolo tsa go bala
feat.privacy: Polokeleo e le ya pele. Datha ya gago, taolo ya gago.

auth.desktopTip: O mo desktop? Skana ka founo ya gago gore o nne le app.
auth.scanHelper: O mo desktop? Skana ka founo ya gago gore o nne le app.

headlineAlt.main: Mothomong yo o sireletsegileng yo o

auth.subhead: Melaetsa e e poraebete, e e sireletsegileng, le e e fetolelwang — ka potlako.
auth.tip: Tip: Dirisa akhaonto e le nngwe mo web le mo mobile. Melaetsa ya gago e nna e kopane.
auth.scanHint: Skana gore o laole app kgotsa o bula mo browser ya gago.
auth.androidAria: Nna le yone mo Google Play

registration.passwordDescription: Bontlha 6 ya ditlhaka. Dirisa password e e matla, e e sa tshwaneng le e nngwe.
registration.smsConsent: Ka go bopa akhaonto, o dumalana le go amogela dikgopolo tsa SMS tse di amanang le tiro ya gago mo Chatforia (jaaka melaetsa e e tswang mo badirising ba bangwe). Ditlhwanelo tsa melaetsa le datha di ka dirwa. O ka tlogela nako e nngwe le e nngwe mo Settings.

auth.addRecipient: Tsenya moamogedi o o fa godimo gore o simolole…
auth.oneRecipient: Tsenya moamogedi o le mongwe jaanong.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Tsenya leina la motswalle o o bolokilweng kgotsa nomoro ya founo.
auth.sendFailed: Go romela go palegile. Lekola console gore o bone dintlha.

home.title: Gae
home.subheader: Romela molaetsa gore o simolole chat.

refund.title: Molao wa Pusetso ya Tjhelete
refund.intro: Mo Chatforia, re leka go naya badirisi tsotlhe tirelo e e siameng. Molao ono wa pusetso o tlhalosa maemo a pusetso e ka dirwang ka ona.

subscriptions.title: Dipeeletso (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Dipeeletso di duelwa pele mme di tswelela ka nako e e ikemetseng. O ka emisa nako nngwe le nngwe ka di-setting tsa akhaonto ya gago kgotsa sethala se o se dirisitseng go reka.

eligibility.title: Tshwanelo ya Pusetso
eligibility.body: Pusetso e ka dirwa fa go na le ditefello tse di kopaneng, diphoso tsa ditefello, kgotsa mathata a thekenoloji a a thibelang go dirisa ditirelo tse di duelwang. Dikopo tsotlhe di sekasekiwa ka bongwe ka bongwe.

nonRefundable.title: Tse di sa Busediweng
nonRefundable.body: Ka kakaretso, ga re busetse tjhelete ya nako e e sa dirisiwang, karolo ya peeletso, kgotsa fa o sa emisa pele ga nako ya go tsosolosa.

thirdParty.title: Ditheko tsa Boraro
thirdParty.body: Fa o rekile ka sethala sa boraro jaaka Apple App Store, o tshwanetse go kopa pusetso ka sethala seo ka tlhamalalo.

contact.title: Ikgolaganye le Rona
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: Goreng Dipolatformo tsa Melaetsa di le Bohlokwa Gompieno
whyMessaging.intro: Dipolatformo tsa melaetsa di fetogile karolo ya botlhokwa ya puisano mo lefatsheng la gompieno...
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Batho ba ikaegile ka di-app tsa melaetsa letsatsi le letsatsi...
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Dipolatformo di kgokaganya batho lefatshe ka bophara...
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Dipolatformo tsa segompieno di naya badirisi taolo...
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Melaetsa e tswelela go gola ka dikarolo tse disha...
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia e agilwe ka melao eno...

global.title: Bokamoso jwa Puisano ya Lefatshe
global.barriersDesc: Batho ba kgona go ikgolaganya lefatshe ka bophara...
global.translationDesc: Puo e ne e le thibelo mo nakong e e fetileng...
global.futureDesc: Bokamoso bo tla tlisa dikarolo tse dingwe...
global.outro: Dipolatformo jaaka Chatforia ke karolo ya phetoho eno...

index.title: Blog ya Chatforia
index.post1: Tsela ya go Bua ka Polokesego mo Inthaneteng
index.post3: Goreng Dipolatformo tsa Melaetsa di le Bohlokwa

howItWorks.title: Tsela e Chatforia e Dirang ka Yone
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia e diretswe go dira puisano bonolo...
howItWorks.step1Desc: Ikwadise ka imeile kgotsa leina la modirisi...

safety.title: Polokesego le Melawana ya Setšhaba
safety.intro: Chatforia e ikemiseditse go boloka tikologo e e sireletsegileng...

tools.report: Begela boitshwaro jo bo sa siamang

safety.enforcementDesc: Re ka tsaya kgato kgatlhanong le diakhaonto...

chat.selectPrompt: Kgetha molaetsa kgotsa kamore ya chat gore o simolole go chat
chat.emptySubtitle: Romela molaetsa gore o simolole chat.
chat.blockConfirm: Thibela {{name}}? O tla se amogele melaetsa e e tswang mo go ene.
chat.blockError: Ga ke a kgona go lemoga modirisi yo o thibelwang.
chat.blockFailed: Go thibela go palegile (backend ga e a tlamanngwa jaanong).
chat.encryptedUnavailable: Molaetsa o o sireletsegileng (senotlolo ga se teng)
chat.unlockToView: Tsamaisa senotlolo sa gago gore o bone molaetsa o

messageInput.freeLimit: Moedi wa plan ya mahala: auto-delete go fihla ka letsatsi le le lengwe. E thibetswe go 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Bontlha jwa auto-delete mo Premium ke matsatsi a 30. E thibetswe go 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Tsenya molaetsa kgotsa kgwebile faele gore o romelwe.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Sireletso e palegile. Molaetsa ga o a romelwa.
messageInput.caption: Caption (e e sa tlhokegeng)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Kgwebile e kgolo thata. Leka faele e nnye.
errors.unsupportedFile: Mofuta wa faele o o sa tlhokegeng.
errors.rateLimit: O romela melaetsa ka lebelo thata. A re nne re nne re nne re nne re nne.
errors.validation: Phoso ya tlhahlobo. Lekola molaetsa wa gago mme o leke gape.
errors.failedToSend: Go romela go palegile. O ka leka gape bubble e e palegileng.

contactList.noContactsFound: Ga go na ditswalle tse di fitlhelweng.
contactList.notJoined: Motswalle yo ga a so tsene mo Chatforia.
contactList.couldNotStart: Ga ke a kgona go simolola chat. Leka gape.
contactList.startFailed: Go simolola chat go palegile. Leka gape.
contactList.deleteFailed: Go tlosa motswalle go palegile. Leka gape.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Go nchafatsa alias go palegile. Leka gape.
contactList.loadFailed: Go laola ditswalle go palegile. Leka gape.
contactList.callStarted: Go letsa nomoro e ka nomoro ya gago ya Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Go simolola go letsa go palegile. Leka gape.

addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Tsenya nomoro ya founo kgotsa username.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: O ka se tsenye wena jaaka motswalle.

sidebar.callTextForwarding: Go letsa & go romela melaetsa ka go fetisetsa
sidebar.forwarding: Go letsa & go romela melaetsa ka go fetisetsa
sidebar.loginPrompt: Log in gore o fetole dithulaganyo tsa gago.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Ga go na media e e bolokilweng mo lefelong la gago jaanong.

status.captionLabel: Ke eng se se mo mogopolong wa gago?

audience.mutuals: Ba o latelang le ba o latelang

status.filesNote: Go fihla ka difaele tse 5. 24h expiry ka tlhago.

voicemail.markRead: Tshwaya e le e e balilweng
voicemail.unreadDotAria: Letshwao la voicemail e e sa balweng

profile.title: Profailo ya Modirisi
profile.mustLogin: O tlhoka go sign in gore o bone dithulaganyo.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Bontsha molaetsa wa pele le wa fetolelwang
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Bontsha molaetsa wa pele le wa fetolelwang ka thoko
profile.filterExplicit: Tlhatlhoba dikgopolo tse di sa tshwaneleng
profile.allowExplicitContent: Dumella dikgopolo tse di sa tshwaneleng
profile.saveError: Phoso: Ga ke a kgona go boloka dithulaganyo
profile.noPrivateKey: Ga go na senotlolo sa poraebete mo selemong seno gore o laole.
profile.setBackupPassword: Tlhoma password gore o sireletse backup ya gago:
profile.backupDownloaded: Backup e e sireletsegileng e laolwe.
profile.importSuccess: Senotlolo sa poraebete se imporitswe mo selemong seno.
profile.importFailed: Go imporita senotlolo go palegile (password e phoso kgotsa faele e senyegile).
profile.keysRotated: Pair e ncha ya dinotlolo e bopilwe le go laola senotlolo sa phatlalatsa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Senotlolo sa gago sa poraebete ga se tsamaye mo selemong seno. Laola kopi e e sireletsegileng ka password gore o e busetse mo selemong se sengwe.
profile.themeFreeNotice: O mo Free—dirisa dikgetho tsa Sun/Moon tse di bonolo fa tlase. Upgrade gore o buele dithulaganyo tse di oketsegileng.
profile.backupTitle: Backup tse di Sireletsegileng & Go kopanya Diselemong
profile.backupDesc: Boloka senotlolo sa gago sa sireletso gore o kgone go busetsa melaetsa ya gago mo selemong se sengwe ka polokeleo.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Blur fa app e sa tsepame
profile.planLoadFailed: Go laola plan ya gago go palegile.
profile.freePlanCopy: O mo plan ya mahala. Upgrade gore o buele dithulaganyo tse di oketsegileng jaaka backups, dinomoro tse di oketsegileng, le dithulaganyo tsa polokeleo tse di phahameng.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ga ke a kgona go bula billing portal. Leka gape.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Nkitsise fa molaetsa wa gago o kopiilwe
profile.followHint: Dipalo tsa bone di tla bonala mo feed ya gago ya Following fa ba romela ka baamogedi Followers (kgotsa Public).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Go na le phoso mo karolong e.
profile.forwarding: Go letsa & go romela melaetsa ka go fetisetsa
profile.callTextForwardingSection: Go letsa & go romela melaetsa ka go fetisetsa
profile.callTextForwardingTitle: Go letsa le/kgotsa go romela melaetsa ka go fetisetsa
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Fetisetsa di letsa le melaetsa e e tsenang mo founong kgotsa email ya gago e e verified. Di letsa/melaetsa e e tswang e ka bontsha nomoro ya gago ya Chatforia.
profile.destinationPhoneForCalls: Founo e e lebisitsweng (E.164) ya di letsa
profile.aliasBridging: Go letsa ka go fetisetsa (alias bridging)
profile.quietHoursOptional: Diura tsa kgotso (e e sa tlhokegeng)
profile.forwardSaved: Dithulaganyo tsa go fetisetsa di bolokilwe
profile.errE164: Tsenya nomoro e e valid ya E.164 (e.g., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Kgetha bonyane lefelo le le lengwe (founo kgotsa email).
profile.errQuietHours: Diura tsa kgotso di tlhoka go ba fa gare ga 0 le 23.
profile.ageBandPlaceholder: Kgetha nako ya gago ya dingwaga
profile.ageBandHint: Re boloka fela nako ya dingwaga (eseng letsatsi la gago la tswalo). Se se dirisediwa go boloka dipalo tsa Random Chat di leka.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Dirisa go tshwarana ka dingwaga mo Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Fa e le on, re leka go kopanya le batho ba ba mo nakong e e tshwanetseng ya dingwaga.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Ke mang yo o ka kopanang le wena?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Bana ba dingwaga tsa 13–17 ba kopanngwa fela le bana ba dingwaga tsa 13–17. Batho ba bagolo ba ka se kopanngwe le bana.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ka polokeleo, diakhaonto tsa dingwaga tsa 13–17 di ka kopanngwa fela le diakhaonto tse dingwe tsa 13–17 mo Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Letla Ria gore e gopole dilo tse o di bolelelang yone
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Fa se se on, Foria e ka dirisa dikopanano tsa gago tsa Random Chat tsa kgale (fela le wena) gore e boloke kopano e tswelela. O ka tlogela nako e nngwe le e nngwe.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Tlogela e le se nang letho gore e nne ka metlha
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email e e romelwang dikgopolo tsa voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: E dirisediwa fa greeting ya lentswe ya gago e sa teng.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Greeting ya voicemail e laolwe ka katlego
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Go laola greeting ya voicemail go palegile
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails tse di tswang mo dinomoring tsa gago tsa Chatforia di bolokwa mo inbox ya gago ya Voicemail. O ka dirisa transcription le go fetisetsa mo dipolaneng tse di tshegetswang.
profile.portHint: O batla go boloka nomoro ya gago ya jaanong? O ka e portela mo Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Nna le datha ya mobile ya Chatforia fa o le kgakala le Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Laola plan ya gago ya mobile ya Chatforia, dinomoro, go fetisetsa, le go porta nomoro.

options.heading: Kgetha ka moo o batlang go dirisa Chatforia
options.subheading: O ka nna le nomoro e ncha ya Chatforia, kgotsa o tlisa nomoro ya gago ya jaanong go tswa mo carrier e nngwe.
options.newNumber: Nna le nomoro e ncha ya Chatforia
options.portNumber: Porta nomoro ya gago ya jaanong mo Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Porta nomoro ya gago ya jaanong
port.subheading: Tlisa nomoro ya gago ya founo ya jaanong go tswa mo carrier ya gago ya jaanong mo Chatforia. Tlhomamisa gore dintlha di tshwana le akhaonto ya gago ya carrier gore o se ka wa tsenya di nako.
port.phoneNumberLabel: Nomoro ya founo e e portiwang
port.fullNameLabel: Leina le le felletseng mo akhaonteng
port.address2Label: Aterese ya mola 2 (e e sa tlhokegeng)
port.success: Kopo ya go porta e rometswe! Re tla nna re go kitsisa.

status.heading: Status ya go porta
status.subheading: Latela status ya dikopo tsa gago tsa go porta nomoro.
status.loadError: Go laola dikopo tsa go porta go palegile.
status.none: Ga go na tiro ya go porta jaanong.

wireless.dataLow: Datha ya gago e a fela.
wireless.exhausted: Datha ya gago e fedile. Reka pack e ncha gore o tswelele go dirisa datha ya mobile.

family.title: Lelapa
family.loading: Go laola dintlha tsa lelapa la gago…

error.load: Go laola dintlha tsa lelapa go palegile.
error.invite: Ga ke a kgona go bopa invite. Tlhomamisa gore o mong wa lelapa mme o leke gape.
error.checkout: Ga re a kgona go simolola checkout ya plan ya Lelapa. Leka gape.

billing.myPlanError: Ga re a kgona go laola plan ya gago.
billing.freePlanCopy: O mo plan ya mahala. Upgrade gore o buele dithulaganyo tse di oketsegileng.
billing.portalError: Ga re a kgona go bula billing portal jaanong.
billing.cancelNowHelp: O ka laola kgotsa kansela subscription mo billing portal, kgotsa kansela ka potlako fa tlase.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: A o tlhomamisetse gore o batla go kansela plan ya gago ka potlako? Se se ka se kgone go dira gape.
billing.cancelNowError: Ga re a kgona go kansela plan ya gago jaanong. Leka gape kgotsa dirisa Manage billing.

none.title: Ga go na lelapa le le tlhomilweng jaanong
none.body: Gore o bope Chatforia Family le pool ya datha e e kopanetsweng, simolola plan ya Lelapa.

data.heading: Pool ya datha e e kopanetsweng
data.caption: Ditho tsotlhe di abelana pool e. Re tla go lemosa fa o atamela moedi wa gago.

members.title: Ditho tsa lelapa
members.name: Leina
members.unlimited: Ga go na moedi o o kgethegileng

invite.title: Laletsa letho le le lesha
invite.body: Romela email kgotsa link gore o laletse motho mo pool ya datha e e kopanetsweng ya lelapa la gago.
invite.expiryHint: Link e e fela morago ga matsatsi a mmalwa. O ka bopa e ncha nako e nngwe le e nngwe.

join.title: Tsena mo lelapeng
join.body: O laleditswe go tsena mo Chatforia Family le go abelana pool ya datha ya bone.
join.cta: Dumela le go tsena mo lelapeng
join.ctaLogin: Sign in le go tsena mo lelapeng
join.success: O tsene mo lelapeng le. Jaaka o abelana pool ya datha ya bone jaanong.
join.error: Ga re a kgona go go tsenya mo lelapeng le. Invite e ka nna e sa valid kgotsa e fedile.

premium.heading: Ya Premium
premium.description: Buela dithulaganyo tsa maatla & tlosa ads.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Simolola ka plan ya rona ya mahala e e nang le ads. Ya ad-free ka Plus, kgotsa bue dithulaganyo tsa maatla ka botlalo ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Kgetha plan ya app, tsenya datha packs mo go wena, kgotsa abelana datha le lelapa la gago — tsotlhe mo lefelo le le lengwe.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Simolola ka plan ya rona ya mahala e e nang le ads. Ya ad-free ka Plus, kgotsa bue dithulaganyo tsa maatla ka botlalo ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Tsenya datha ya global eSIM gore Chatforia e tswelele go dira le fa o le kgakala le Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Bopa pool ya datha e e kopanetsweng ya lelapa la gago le laola tiro ya mongwe le mongwe mo lefelo le le lengwe.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Buela dithulaganyo tsa maatla & tlosa ads.

scheduleBanner.title: Subscription e tla fela
scheduleBanner.body: O tla boela mo Free ka

free.title: Mahala
free.desc: Simolola melaetsa ka mahala. E siame fa o leka Chatforia fela.

features.chat: Chat ya 1:1 le group ka nako ya nnete, le di letsa tsa lentswe le video
features.media: Abelana ditshwantsho, melaetsa ya lentswe, le video tse di khutshwanyana
features.ai: Karabo tsa AI tse di bohlale le phetolelo ya potlako (fair use)
features.disappearing: Melaetsa e e nyamalang le dithulaganyo tsa polokeleo tsa motheo
features.ads: Mahala ka metlha ka ads mo app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Tsotlhe tse di motheo, ntle le ads. E siame mo botshelo jwa letsatsi le letsatsi ba melaetsa le go letsa.

features.allFree: Tsotlhe tse di mo Free, ntle le ads
features.forwarding: Fetisetsa di letsa le melaetsa mo nomorong ya gago ya founo ya nnete
features.history: Histori e e telele ya melaetsa (go fihla ka dikgwedi tse 6)
features.support: Thuso e e potlako fa go na le phoso

plus.ctaPublic: Nna le Plus – tswelela go login

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: Boiphihlelo jwa Chatforia ka botlalo: dithulaganyo tsa AI, go dira ka gago, le thuso e e pele.

features.themes: Buela dithulaganyo tsa mebala ya premium le go dira app
features.ai: Dithulaganyo tsa AI tsa Premium fela tsa go re-write, karabo tse di bohlale, le summaries
features.support: Thuso e e pele fa o tlhoka thuso thata

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Boloka mo go feta fa o patala ka ngwaga — go akaretsa dithulaganyo tsa mebala tse di oketsegileng, dithulaganyo tsa AI, le thuso e e pele.

features.allPremium: Tsotlhe tse di mo Premium Monthly — go akaretsa dithulaganyo tsa mebala tse di oketsegileng
features.save25: Boloka mo go feta 30% fa o bapisa le go patala monthly
features.bestFor: E siame mo badiriseng ba maatla, badirisi ba kgakala, le baeti ba ba boima

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Boloka 30% ka annual – tswelela go login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Patala ka pele. Kansela nako e nngwe le e nngwe. Ga go na ditshenyegelo tse di fitlhegileng.

marketing.plusDesc: Boiphihlelo jwa ad-free jo bo theko e tlase thata.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Dithulaganyo tsa botlalo, ditumologo, le dithulaganyo tsa maatla a AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Boloka mo go feta fa o patala ka ngwaga.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Patala ka pele. Kansela nako e nngwe le e nngwe. Ga go na ditshenyegelo tse di fitlhegileng.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Tsenya datha ya global gore Chatforia e tswelele go dira le fa o se na Wi-Fi. Ditheko di fetoga ka tlhago go ya ka naga le currency ya gago.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Kgetha pack e le nngwe ya datha ya global gore Chatforia e tswelele go dira fa o le mo leetong kgotsa o le kgakala le Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ga re rekise data packs tse di ka tlase ga 3 GB.
mobile.localEqualsFallback: Local = naga ya gago ya jaanong
mobile.cta: Nna le pack ya datha e
mobile.ctaPublic: Nna le pack ya datha e

features.heavyUse: Datha e e potlako thata mo tiro e e boima
features.throttle: Lebelo le ka nna la nna la nna la nna la nna morago ga tiro e e boima
features.noContract: Pack e le nngwe, ga go na konteraka

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs di tlhoka selemong se se tshegetswang eSIM le se se sa thibelwang. Go teng ga yone go ya ka mofuta wa founo, carrier, le naga. Go sireletsega le lebelo di fetoga go ya ka lefelo.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: E akaretsa 3 GB ya datha e e potlako thata — e siame mo melaetseng e e nnye le di letsa tsa nako le nako.
small.bestFor: Maitlhotlhobo a a khutshwanyana, melaetsa e e nnye, le di letsa tsa nako le nako

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: E akaretsa 5 GB ya datha e e potlako thata mo maitlhotlhobong, go ya tiro, le di letsa tsa VoIP tsa ka mehla.
medium.bestFor: Maitlhotlhobo a beke, di letsa tsa VoIP tsa ka mehla, le mepapatso

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: E akaretsa 10 GB ya datha e e potlako thata mo chat e e boima, di letsa, le video mo netwerkeng ya Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Chat e e boima, di letsa, video, le go dirisa hotspot
large.aria: Reka Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Bapisa eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Tiro ya datha ya nnete e ya ka moo o dirisang Chatforia (lentswe, video, media, le diapp tse dingwe mo founong ya gago).

family.title: Chatforia Family (datha e e kopanetsweng)
family.subtitle: Abelana pool e le nngwe ya datha mo lelapeng la gago. Pina e le nngwe, diakhaonto tse di mmalwa tsa Chatforia, go sireletsega mo lefatseng lotlhe.

small.title: Lelapa Small
small.desc: E akaretsa 20 GB ya datha e e potlako thata e e kopanetsweng — e siame mo badiriseng ba le 2–3 ba ba nnye.

medium.title: Lelapa Medium
medium.desc: E akaretsa 40 GB ya datha e e potlako thata e e kopanetsweng — e siame mo dithong tse di 3–5 tse di tsweletsweng.

large.title: Lelapa Large
large.desc: E akaretsa 80 GB ya datha e e potlako thata e e kopanetsweng — mo malapeng a maatla a a ntseng a le online ka metlha.

feature.shared: Pool ya datha e e kopanetsweng ya lelapa la gago
feature.members: Laletsa go fihla ka ditho tse 4 tse di oketsegileng
feature.membersMore: E siame mo dithong tse di 3–5 tse di tsweletsweng
feature.manage: Laola medi mo mothong le mothong
feature.topUp: Tsenya packs tse di oketsegileng nako e nngwe le e nngwe
feature.bestValue: Boleng jo bo molemo ka GB
feature.fairUse: Go ya ka polisi ya fair-use le medi tsa lefelong

family.disclaimer: Dipalo tsa lelapa di bopa kgotsa tlhatswa pool e e kopanetsweng ya datha. O ka laletsa le tlosa ditho nako e nngwe le e nngwe.
family.footnote: Dipalo tsa lelapa di abelana pool e le nngwe ya datha mo diakhaontong tsa Chatforia tse di kopanetsweng. Go teng le medi di ya ka naga le melao ya lefelong.

why.title: Ke ka ntlha yang batho ba fetela Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia e go fa nomoro ya nnete ya founo, phetolelo e e bohlale, le tsela e e hlakileng ya go ya ad-free fa o itekanetse.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads tse di nnye mo Free, upgrade e bonolo ya Plus fa o itekanetse, le dithulaganyo tsa AI tse TextNow e sa di nayang.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App e e ncha, ponagalo e e lebisitsweng mo lefatshe, le phetolelo e e haeng mo go fapana le go fetisetsa di letsa tsa kgale.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs diapp tsa chat
messengers.body: Romela dinomoro tsa nnete tsa founo — eseng fela badirisi ba app e nngwe — ka AI le status e e haeng mo go yone. E siame fa o tswa mo diapp tse di tshwanang le TextFree kgotsa TextMe.

feature.translation: Phetolelo e e haeng mo go yone

history.textnow: E fetoga go ya ka akhaonto

upgrade.disclaimer: Go bapisa go ya ka dintlha tse di bonwang phatlalatsa mme di ka fetoga ka nako. Diapp tse dingwe tsa go romela melaetsa tsa mahala jaaka TextFree kgotsa TextMe di tshwana thata le TextNow.

free.q: A plan ya Mahala e mahala ruri?
free.a: Ee. Plan ya Mahala e akaretsa nomoro ya Chatforia, go letsa, le melaetsa ka ads. O ka nna mo Free ka nako e telele jaaka o batla, kgotsa upgrade gore o tlose ads le go bue dithulaganyo tse di oketsegileng.

plusPremium.q: Phapano ke efe fa gare ga Plus le Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus e tlosa ads le go oketsa histori ya melaetsa — e siame mo tiro ya letsatsi le letsatsi. Premium e tsenya go dira ka gago, dithulaganyo tsa AI tsa go re-write le replies, le thuso e e pele mo badiriseng ba boima.

esim.q: Datha packs tsa eSIM di dira kae?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile e dirisa go sireletsega ga global eSIM. Go teng ga yone go ya ka naga le selemong sa gago. O tla bona dikgetho tse di tshegeditsweng mo go simolola mo app.

cancel.q: A nka kansela kgotsa fetola dipalo nako e nngwe le e nngwe?
cancel.a: Ee. O ka laola kgotsa kansela subscription ya gago mo lepage la billing mo app. Diphetogo di dira mo bofelong jwa nako ya gago ya billing ya jaanong.

family.q: Dipalo tsa Lelapa di dira jang?
family.a: Dipalo tsa Lelapa di bopa pool e e kopanetsweng ya datha mo diakhaontong tse di mmalwa tsa Chatforia. Motho o le mongwe o patala pina, mme o ka laletsa kgotsa tlosa ditho le go tlhoma medi mo mothong le mothong.

gettingStarted.title: Go Simolola
gettingStarted.subtitle: O mofofofofo mo Chatforia? Thulaganyo e e bonolo e bontsha dintlha tsa motheo gore o kgone go dira mo metsotso e mmalwa.

alert.text: Thulaganyo e tla gola fa re tsenya dithulaganyo tse ncha. Fa go na le se se sa teng, re kitsise ka

section1.title: 1) Bopa akhaonto ya gago
section1.loginText: ka akhaonto ya gago e e leng teng.

section2.title: 2) Simolola melaetsa
section2.item1: Bopa DM kgotsa Group mme o romela molaetsa wa gago wa pele.
section2.item2: Dirisa phetolelo ya potlako gore o chat mo dipuong tse di fetang 100.
section2.item3: Leka melaetsa e e nyamalang le dikgopolo tsa go bala mo Profailo → Polokeleo.

section3.title: 3) Tswelela pele
section3.item1: O ka upgrade go plan e e patalwang nako e nngwe le e nngwe mo app.
section3.item2: Fa o sena go sign in, o ka kopanya diselemong tse di oketsegileng le go tlhoma backups tse di sireletsegileng go tswa mo Settings mo app.

account.q: Nka bopa kgotsa busetsa akhaonto ya gago jang?
account.a: Laola app kgotsa dirisa web, tobetsa “Bopa akhaonto”, verify email/founo ya gago. Gore o busetse, dirisa “O lebetse password”.

privacy.q: A melaetsa e sireletsegile go tlo qetellong?
privacy.a: Ee. Melaetsa le di letsa di sireletsegile go tlo qetellong ka tlhago. Ke wena le moamogedi fela yo o ka di balang.

translate.q: Phetolelo ya potlako e dira jang?
translate.a: Dirisa “Auto-translate” mo Settings → Ponagalo & Puo. Re fetolela mo selemong fa e tshegeditswe, kgotsa ka APIs tse di sireletsegileng tse di nang le metadata e e nnye.

contact.a: Fihlela rona mo support@chatforia.com. Akaretsa ditshwantsho le version ya app ya gago.

contact.title: Ikopanye le Rona
contact.successMsg: Ke a leboga—setlhopha sa rona se tla araba ka email.
contact.errorSend: Ga ke a kgona go romela. Email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Polisi e e Tlhalosang ya Polokeleo e tlhalosa ka moo Chatforia (“rona”, “rona”) e kokoanya, e dirisa, le go abelana dintlha fa o dirisa diapp le ditirelo tsa rona. Re bopa Chatforia gore e fokotse datha e re ka e fitlhelang.

infoWeCollect.title: Dintlha tse re di kokoanyang
infoWeCollect.account: Dintlha tsa akhaonto (e.g., email/founo) gore re bope le go sireletsa akhaonto ya gago.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Dikgopolo tse di sireletsegileng (melaetsa/di letsa) di sireletsegile go tlo qetellong; re ka se di bale.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/tshusumetso jaaka crash logs, mofuta wa selemong, kgotsa analytics e e bonolo gore re nchafatse tiro.

sms.title: Dinomoro tsa founo tsa mobile le SMS
sms.body: Fa o kgetha go fana ka nomoro ya founo ya mobile, re e dirisa gore re dirise dithulaganyo tse di tshwanang le go verify akhaonto, dikgopolo tsa login, le melaetsa ya modirisi-go-modirisi ka SMS fa e tshegeditswe. Re ka romela melaetsa a transactional a SMS a a amanang le akhaonto le tiro ya gago mo Chatforia. O ka tlogela go amogela melaetsa a SMS nako e nngwe le e nngwe ka go araba ka lentswe le le tshegeditsweng la go tlogela (jaaka “STOP”) kgotsa ka go fetola dikgetho tsa gago tsa dikgopolo mo app. Ga re rekise nomoro ya gago ya founo kgotsa re e dirise mo go marketing e e sa amaneng.
sms.addRecipient: Tsenya moamogedi o o fa godimo gore o simolole…

howWeUse.title: Re dirisa dintlha jang
howWeUse.provide: Fana le go sireletsa tirelo (auth, go lemoga spam/abuse).
howWeUse.improve: Nchafatsa dithulaganyo (boleng jwa phetolelo, go tshepa).

sharing.title: Go abelana
sharing.body: Ga re rekise datha ya poraebete. Re ka abelana datha e e fokotsegileng le badirisi (e.g., dikgopolo tsa push, analytics) ka konteraka e e thata.

rights.title: Ditshwanelo tsa gago
rights.body: Go ya ka lefelo la gago (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), o ka kopa go fitlhela, go baakanya, go tlosa, kgotsa go tlogela go tshwarwa mo go tshwarwa mo go tshwarwa mo go tshwarwa mo go tshwarwa. Ikopanye: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Go boloka datha & polokeleo
retention.body: Re boloka fela se se tlhokegang gore re tsamaye tirelo le go dirisa polokeleo e e tlwaelegileng ya intaseti. Dikgopolo tsa E2E di ka se kgone go tlhatswa ke rona.

children.title: Bana
children.body: Chatforia ga e lebiswe mo baneng ba ka tlase ga 13 (kgotsa jaaka molao wa gago o tlhoka).

changes.title: Diphetogo
changes.body: Re tla romela diphetogo mo le re nchafatse letsatsi la “E nchafaditswe la bofelo”.

contact.title: Ikopanye
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ka go dirisa Chatforia o dumalana le melao e. Fa o sa dumalane, o se ka wa dirisa tirelo.

accounts.title: Diakhaonto
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Fana ka dintlha tse di nepahetseng le go boloka dikhredensiale ka polokeleo.
accounts.itemResponsibility: O ikarabela mo tirong mo akhaonteng ya gago.

acceptableUse.title: Tiro e e amogelesegang
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Ga go na dikgopolo tse di sa laolwang, tse di sa tshwaneleng, kgotsa tse di senyang; ga go na spam kgotsa go dirisa ka boikemelo.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Re ka thibela/kgotsa tlosa ka go tlola melao.

sms.title: Dikopano tsa SMS
sms.body: Fa o fana ka nomoro ya founo ya mobile, o dumalana gore Chatforia e ka go romela melaetsa a SMS a a amanang le akhaonto le tiro ya gago mo tirelong, jaaka dikgopolo tsa login, dikgopolo tsa polokeleo, le melaetsa a a amanang le dikopanano tse o di simolotseng kgotsa o ntseng mo go tsone. Ga re dirise SMS mo go marketing kgotsa go tshusumetsa ntle le tumelo ya gago e e hlakileng. Ditlhwanelo tsa melaetsa le datha di ka dirwa. O ka tlogela melaetsa a SMS nako e nngwe le e nngwe ka go araba ka lentswe le le tshegeditsweng la go tlogela (ka mohlala, “STOP”) kgotsa ka go nchafatsa dithulaganyo tsa gago tsa dikgopolo mo app.

yourContent.title: Dikgopolo tsa gago
yourContent.body: O nna le ditshwanelo tsa dikgopolo tsa gago. O re fa ditshwanelo tse di tlhokegang gore re tsamaye tirelo (e.g., go tsamaisa, go boloka, phetolelo).

disclaimer.title: Ditlhaloso & boikarabelo
disclaimer.body: Tirelo e faniwa “jaaka e le” ntle le ditlhaloso. Go ya ka molao o o dumelletsweng, Chatforia ga e na boikarabelo mo ditshenyegeleng tse di sa lebiswang kgotsa tse di tswang mo go tsone.

changes.title: Diphetogo
changes.body: Re ka nchafatsa melao e; go tswelela go dirisa morago ga diphetogo go bolela gore o dumalana.

contact.title: Ikopanye
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: O se ka wa Rekisa kgotsa Abelana Dintlha tsa Gago tsa Poraebete
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ga e rekise dintlha tsa poraebete. Baagi ba California ba ka tswelela go romela dikopo ka tlase ga CPRA ka konopo e fa tlase.

cookies.title: Dithulaganyo tsa Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia e dirisa cookies tse di nnye (e.g., session, polokeleo). Ga re dirise cookies tsa ads tsa batho ba boraro. Laola cookies ka dithulaganyo tsa browser ya gago.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Ga ke a kgona go laola status ya nomoro ya founo.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Ga go na nomoro e e abetsweng. Kgetha e le nngwe ka area code gore o simolole go romela melaetsa.

startChatModal.title: Simolola chat
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Tsenya leina, username, founo, kgotsa email…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Tsenya username kgotsa founo mme o tobetsa Tlhatlhoba.
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Kgetha bonyane moamogedi o le mongwe.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Dintlha tsa founo/email di tla nna teng morago ga gore o di boloke jaaka ditswalle.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Go simolola chat ka baamogedi ba kgethilweng go palegile.
startChatModal.groupNameOptional: Leina la group (e e sa tlhokegeng)
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Molaetsa wa pele (e e sa tlhokegeng mme e kgothaletswa)

sounds.freeNotice: O mo Free — ditumologo tsa premium di bontshiwa mme di lokeleditswe. Upgrade gore o bue tsotlhe.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Thulaganyo e e tlhoka plan ya Premium.

aiSettings.title: Dithulaganyo tsa AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Laola phetolelo, karabo tse di bohlale, le dikarabo tsa boikemelo tsa ForiaBot.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Bontsha molaetsa wa pele ka thoko le phetolelo
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Romela melaetsa e mmalwa e e amogetsweng ya kgale (e e tlhatswetsweng) mo AI gore e kgothaletse dikarabo tse di bonolo.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Mask profanity mo dikgopolo tsa AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Fa e le on, dikgopolo tse di busitsweng ke AI di tla nna le mafoko a a tshwaeditsweng a a maskilweng
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Dirisa auto-reply fa ke le busy
aiSettings.activeUntilOptional: E dira go fihla (e e sa tlhokegeng)
aiSettings.saveFailed: Go boloka dithulaganyo tsa AI go palegile
aiSettings.translateAll: Fetolela melaetsa yotlhe e e tsenang

accessibilitySettings.title: Go Fitlhelela & Dikgopolo
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Dikgetho tse di dirang gore Chatforia e be bonolo go dirisa ntle le go itshepa lentswe.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: E simolola ka bontlha bo bo tlwaelegileng. Oketsa fa o ratile molaetsa o o kgolo mo dithulaganyong tsa go fitlhelela.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Dikgopolo tsa pono mo melaetseng & di letsa
Bontsha banners le go blink title gore o se ka wa fosa tiro.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate mo melaetseng e mecha (fa e tshegeditswe)
Tshusumetsa vibration ya selemong ka dikgopolo.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen mo go letseng mo go tsenang
Flash e e khutshwanyana e e kganya fa go letsa di letsa.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Kgwebile transcript mo melaetseng a lentswe a o a amogetsweng.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Dikgopolo tsa pono mo melaetseng & di letsa
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Bontsha banners le go blink title gore o se ka wa fosa tiro.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate mo melaetseng e mecha (fa e tshegeditswe)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Tshusumetsa vibration ya selemong ka dikgopolo.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Flash screen mo go letseng mo go tsenang
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Flash e e khutshwanyana e e kganya fa go letsa di letsa.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Sireletso e e thata go tlo qetellong
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Boloka fela ciphertext mo server. E thibela AI/Phetolelo le previews tsa moderation.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Diselemong tse di Kopanetsweng
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Ga go na diselemong tse di kopanetsweng tse di fitlhelweng.

help.title: Thuso
help.cantLogin: Ga ke kgone go log in

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Tlhatlhoba ka alias, leina, username, kgotsa founo
peoplePage.noContactsFound: Ga go na ditswalle tse di fitlhelweng
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Ditsela tse di bonolo tse di mmalwa tsa go simolola.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Abelana link ya gago ya invite gore o simolole go chat ka potlako.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Nna o kopane mo go tswelelang ka Chatforia ya iOS le Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Melaetsa ya gago e nna e kopane mo web le mo mobile.

randomChat.title: Chat e e sa tshwaraneng
randomChat.description: Kopana le motho e mosha ka potlako. Re tla go kopanya mme re bula kamore ya chat e e sa tshwaraneng ya nakoana. Chat ka go se itsiwe pele. Tsenya Motswalle morago fa go utlwala sentle.
randomChat.noPartner: Ga go na motswalle yo o fitlhelweng jaanong.
randomChat.saveGuard: Fela dikopanano tsa motho-go-motho di ka bolokwa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Re boloka fela nako ya dingwaga (eseng letsatsi la gago la tswalo). Se se dirisediwa go boloka dipalo tsa Random Chat di leka. Gore o kopane le batho (eseng fela RiaBot), tlhoma nako ya gago ya dingwaga mo Settings → Nako ya Dingwaga & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Tlhoma nako ya gago ya dingwaga mo Profailo → Nako ya Dingwaga & Random Chat gore o kopanngwe le batho.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Gore o kopane le batho (eseng fela RiaBot), tlhoma nako ya gago ya dingwaga mo Settings → Nako ya Dingwaga & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Kopana le motho e mosha ka potlako, kgotsa kgetha go chat le Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Tlhoma nako ya gago ya dingwaga mo Profailo → Nako ya Dingwaga & Random Chat gore o kopanngwe le batho.
randomChat.messageMatch: Romela molaetsa mo mothong yo o tshwanetseng…

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 Ke Ria. Ke eng se se mo mogopolong wa gago?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ke teng. Ke eng se se mo mogopolong wa gago?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Ke eng se o batlang go bua ka sone kajeno?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}!! Ke mameleng — ke eng se se mo godimo?
greetings.long4: Ke itumedile go go bona, {{name}} 👋 Ke eng se se mo mogopolong wa gago kajeno?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 O batla go vent, botsa, kgotsa fela go chat?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Ke na le nako — ke eng se o batlang go bua ka sone?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, ke sa le teng. Ke eng se se mo godimo?
greetings.short2: O amogelesegile gape {{name}} 👋 A go na le se sengwe se o batlang go se tsenya?
greetings.short3: O boetse gape, {{name}}? 😊 Bolela se se mo mogopolong wa gago.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 O itekanetse go tswelela fa o tlogetse?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! O na le se sesha se se mo mogopolong wa gago?

login.title: Tswelela go Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Log in mo akhaonteng ya gago ya Chatforia
login.subtitle: Log in mo akhaonteng ya gago ya Chatforia
login.googleUnavailable: Go sign-in ka Google ga go teng
login.appleUnavailable: Go sign-in ka Apple ga go teng

forgot.title: O lebetse Password
forgot.helper: Tsenya email e o e dirisitse go bopa akhaonto ya gago ya Chatforia mme re tla go romela link e e sireletsegileng gore o reset password.
forgot.genericError: Ga ke a kgona go tsamaisa kopo. Leka gape mo nakong e khutshwanyana.
forgot.sentHelper: Fa akhaonto e teng ka email e, re rometse link ya go reset password. E ka tsaya metsotso e mmalwa gore e fihle. Tlhomamisa gore o lekola spam kgotsa promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on ga e teng jaanong. Dirisa username & password.

error.unprocessable: Kopo e phoso. Lekola username/email le password ya gago.
error.deviceLimit: Moedi wa diselemong o fihletswe mo plan ya Mahala. Log out mo selemong se sengwe kgotsa upgrade go Premium gore o kopanye diselemong tse di oketsegileng.
error.premiumRequired: Tiro e e tlhoka plan ya Premium.

dialer.title: Di letsa
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (Fa o sa dirise PSTN, simolola di letsa go tswa mo header ya kopano.)
dialer.recentsEmpty: Ga go na di letsa tsa kgale jaanong.
dialer.noRecents: Ga go na di letsa tsa kgale jaanong.

video.title: Video
video.directDesc: Letsa la camera la 1:1 le modirisi yo mongwe.
video.roomsDesc: Video ya batho ba mmalwa ka leina la kamore le le kopanetsweng.
video.roomsIntro: Tsena kgotsa bopa kamore ya batho ba mmalwa.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: o ka deep link ka potlako go /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Direct Video
direct.subtitle: Simolola letsa la video la 1:1 ka nomoro ya founo kgotsa username ya Chatforia.
direct.desc: Letsa la camera la 1:1 le modirisi yo mongwe.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste nomoro mme o letsa ntle le go boloka motswalle. Re tla laletsa ba sa diriseng ka link.

rooms.title: Dikamore
rooms.subtitle: Bopa kamore kgotsa tsena mo e leng teng ka go tlhoma leina le le tshwanang.
rooms.desc: Video ya batho ba mmalwa ka leina la kamore le le kopanetsweng.
rooms.tip: Tip: abelana leina le le mo go bangwe, kgotsa deep link go /video?room=room-name.

directVideo.intro: Simolola letsa la direct video la 1:1.

phoneWarning.title: Nomoro ya gago e a fela ka nako e khutshwanyana
phoneWarning.body: Nomoro ya gago {{number}} e tla lokollwa ka {{date}} ntle le gore e nchafadiwe.

support.heading: Re ka go thusa jang?

quickTopics.login: Ga ke kgone go log in

support.contactIntro: Re tla go romela karabo ka email. Akaretsa dintlha gore re kgone go dira phoso e.
support.sent: Molaetsa o rometswe. Re tla araba ka email.
support.sendError: Ga ke a kgona go romela. Email support@chatforia.com.

encryptionRecovery.title: Laola Sireletso
encryptionRecovery.description: Boloka, busetsa, tswala, kgotsa reset senotlolo sa gago sa sireletso.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Browser e ga e kgone go tlhatswa melaetsa ya gago e e sireletsegileng jaanong. Busetsa, tswala, kgotsa reset senotlolo sa gago gore o tswelele.

sections.restoreFromBackup: Busetsa go tswa mo backup ya akhaonto

confirm.reset:
Reset sireletso mo akhaonteng e?

Melaetsa e e sireletsegileng ya kgale e ka nna e sa kgone go balwa ntle le gore o busetse senotlolo sa pele morago.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Se se bopa senotlolo se sesha sa sireletso mo akhaonteng ya gago. Melaetsa e e sireletsegileng ya kgale e ka nna e sa kgone go balwa ntle le gore o busetse senotlolo sa pele morago.

footer.doNotSell: O se ka wa Rekisa Dintlha tsa Gago

links.do-not-sell-my-info: O se ka wa Rekisa Dintlha tsa Gago

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Mo go batla dintlha tsa media, fihlela rona mo
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ke app ya melaetsa e e lebisitsweng mo polokelelong e e dirang gore chat ya dipuo tse di fapaneng e be bonolo. Melaetsa e sireletsegile go tlo qetellong ka tlhago, le phetolelo e e haeng mo go yone e tshegetsa dipuo tse di fetang 100 ka nako ya nnete. Badirisi ba ka dirisa melaetsa e e nyamalang, boloka dikgopolo tsa go bala di optional, le go kopanya mo diselemong. E teng mo iOS, Android, le web.
press.assetsSubtitle: Logos, ditshwantsho, le ditshwantsho tsa product.
press.scanTip: O mo desktop? Skana ka founo ya gago gore o nne le app.
press.googlePlay: Nna le yone mo Google Play

careers.title: Mesebetsi
careers.intro: Re setlhopha se sennye sa motheo se se bopang Chatforia — mothomong yo o poraebete, yo o global yo o tsenang mo web, iOS, le Android. Fa o tlhokomela polokeleo, sireletso, le boiphihlelo jwa modirisi jo bo monate, re ka itumedela go utlwa go tswa mo go wena.
careers.openRoles: Diro tse di bulegileng tsa motheo: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ka moo o ka dirang kopo: Dirisa konopo e fa tlase gore o romele resume le ditsela tsa gago ka email.
careers.whyNow: Ke ka ntlha yang o tsena jaanong?
careers.whyBullets:
• Thusa go bopa motheo wa mothomong yo mosha yo o global.
• Romela diphetogo tse di dirisediwang mo web, iOS, le Android.
• Dira ka go lebana le motheo mo go bopeng le go lebisa product.
• Nna le dikarolo tsa bohlokwa tsa stack: melaetsa, lentswe, video, sireletso, telecom, AI.
• Tsena mo tshimologong — pele badirisi ba gola.

about.title: Ka ga Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ke mothomong yo o sireletsegileng, yo o multilingual yo o nang le sireletso e e felletseng go tlo qetellong, phetolelo ya potlako, le go letsa ka lentswe/video. Morero wa rona o bonolo: thusa batho go kopana—ka polokeelo, ka poraebete, le mo dipuong tse di fapaneng.
about.valuesTitle: Ke eng se re se ratang

values.privacy: Polokeelo e le ya pele: E2E sireletso ka tlhago.
values.access: Go fitlhelela mo bathong botlhe: Auto-translate dipuo tse di fetang 100.
values.control: Taolo: Melaetsa e e nyamalang & dikgopolo tsa go bala di optional.
values.privacy_aria: Polokeelo e le ya pele: E2E sireletso ka tlhago.
values.access_aria: Go fitlhelela mo bathong botlhe: Auto-translate dipuo tse di fetang 100.
values.control_aria: Taolo: Melaetsa e e nyamalang le dikgopolo tsa go bala di optional.

about.howDescription: Melaetsa e sireletsegile mo selemong sa gago pele e tswa. Phetolelo, backups, le go kopanya diselemong di bopilwe gore di fokotse se server ya rona e ka se bonang.

advertise.title: Advertise le Chatforia
advertise.description: Fihlela badirisi ba melaetsa ba ba tshegeditsweng ka placements a a monate, a a sireletsegileng ka brand. Re fana ka inventory ya banner mo mafelong a a bonalang thata, sponsorships, le house promos. Badirisi ba premium ga ba bone ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Re bo re dira inventory ka Google AdSense. O ka target Chatforia ka publisher ID {{pubId}}, kgotsa dirisa form e fa tlase gore o nne le direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Re bo re dira inventory e nnye ka Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships di teng—dirisa form e fa tlase.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Re a fetsa inventory ya rona ya ads. Re bolelele ka campaign ya gago mme re tla go kgothaletsa placements.

why.highSession: Nako e e telele ya session le go nna mo UI ya chat
why.brandSafe: Mefuta e e sireletsegileng ka brand; go fokotsa frequency ka tlhompho
why.sponsoredMoments: Metsotso e e sponsored (e.g., “Simolola Chat” modal) e teng
why.deals: Direct deals kgotsa programmatic ka AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ke a leboga! Kopo ya gago e a tsamaya. Re tla go araba ka nako e khutshwanyana.
form.successToast: Ke a leboga! Re tla nna re ikopanya le wena ka nako e khutshwanyana.
form.mailtoInfo: Go bula email client ya gago gore o romele kopo…
form.budgetLabel: Budget ya kgwedi (e e sa tlhokegeng)
form.messagePlaceholder: Targeting, dates, KPIs, dikgetho tsa placement…

legal.disclaimerStart: Ka go romela, o dumalana le rona
